name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol.SymbolShapes
summary: The possible shapes of the section mark symbol.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape1
enum_values.summary: The triangle with black and white halves.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape2
enum_values.summary: The arrow line pointing to an orthogonal straight line.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape3
enum_values.summary: The line with half of an arrow end.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape4
enum_values.summary: The rectangle shape with very small height.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape5
enum_values.summary: The triangle and circle shapes mixed. The circle partly hides the triangle.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape6
enum_values.summary: The triangle and circle shapes mixed. The triangle is on top.

enum_values.name: SymbolShape8
enum_values.summary: The triangle shape filled in black.
